2023-24 Houston Christian Huskies Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 6-23 (4-14, 8th in Southland MBB)

Coach: Ron Cottrell

PS/G: 71.5 (239th of 362)

PA/G: 83.4 (362nd of 362)

SRS: -19.37 (357th of 362)

SOS: -3.89 (241st of 362)

ORtg: 97.0 (334th of 362)

DRtg: 113.2 (350th of 362)
